emails.body: FW: Product Type approval for 3 product types (Heating Oil Fin Options) Tana/Kelly/Karen: The product long descriptions below will fall under three new product types= =20 US HeatingOil2 Fin Opt US HeatingOil2 Fin Opt Call US HeatingOil2 Fin Opt Put =20 Credit (Tom Moran) has approved copying the profiles for the new product ty= pe=20 from the following: US HeatingOil2 Fin Swap Please respond no later than 10 a.m. on Wednesday, April 25. Thank you.
